name: Landing Page
description: Single-page, conversion-focused landing page with hero, features, pricing, and CTA.
ai_context: This is a static single-page landing page (HTML/CSS only, no JS, no build tools). Sections: sticky nav with blur effect, hero with headline + two CTA buttons + trusted-by logos, 3 feature cards with icons, how-it-works 3-step process, 3-tier pricing table (Starter/Pro/Enterprise with popular badge), FAQ accordion (CSS-only using <details>/<summary>), final CTA banner, and footer with link columns. CSS custom properties in :root for instant rebranding. Fully responsive. The user will likely ask to: change the product name/copy, adjust pricing tiers, add testimonials, add a signup/waitlist form, change colors, add animations, add more sections, connect to Stripe, embed a demo video, etc.
